blended.narrative: Mont Orford is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,236 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 52°F.
